product_overview: pickados-api is a Spring Boot backend for authentication, profiles, posts, notifications, and admin operations. This PRD adds local PostgreSQL reproducibility, automatic local admin seeding, and hardened feed/timeline queries that respect soft deletes and post visibility rules.
core_goals: Provide a simple local PostgreSQL environment for development and QA.
Automatically seed a default admin user and ADMIN role only in the local profile.
Ensure feed/timeline queries exclude soft-deleted users and respect PUBLIC, FOLLOWERS_ONLY, and PRIVATE visibility.
Prevent duplicate seed data across restarts and keep production unaffected.

features.name: Local PostgreSQL Environment
features.description: Allow developers to run a local PostgreSQL 16 instance with predictable defaults for the backend to connect to during development and testing.
user_flows: Run docker-compose.postgres.yml -> PostgreSQL 16 starts on port 5432 with database pickados_db and credentials postgres/postgres -> Spring Boot app connects successfully using local profile -> Developer can use the backend without remote infrastructure
Run docker-compose.postgres.yml -> PostgreSQL fails to start due to port conflict or container issue -> Logs expose the failure clearly -> Developer fixes the local environment before retrying

features.name: Local Admin Seeder
features.description: On the local profile, ensure the ADMIN role exists and create a default admin account without duplicating records on restart.
user_flows: Start application with spring.profiles.active=local -> Seeder checks for ADMIN role -> Seeder creates ADMIN role if missing -> Seeder checks for admin@pickados.local or username admin -> Seeder creates admin user with hashed password 123456, active=true, deleted=false

Start application with spring.profiles.active=local -> Seeder finds existing ADMIN role and existing admin user by email or username -> Seeder skips creation -> Application starts without duplicate role or user records
Start application with spring.profiles.active=prod -> Seeder does not run because local profile is not active -> No default admin account is created -> Production data remains unchanged

features.name: Feed and Timeline Query Hardening
features.description: Ensure feed and timeline queries correctly exclude soft-deleted users and enforce visibility rules for posts and reposts.
user_flows: GET /posts/** as an authenticated user -> API returns feed/timeline results -> Posts from authors with deleted=true are excluded -> PUBLIC posts are shown according to standard feed rules -> FOLLOWERS_ONLY posts are shown only to followers or the author -> PRIVATE posts are hidden from third parties

GET /posts/** as an authenticated non-follower -> API returns feed/timeline results -> FOLLOWERS_ONLY posts from non-followed authors are omitted -> PRIVATE posts are omitted -> Only allowed PUBLIC content is returned

GET /posts/** where a post or repost belongs to a soft-deleted user -> API evaluates deleted flag using deleted=false or coalesce(deleted,false)=false -> Content is excluded from results -> Feed remains free of deleted-user events

GET /posts/public/{postId} for a post owned by a deleted author or private post -> API returns 404 or an access-denied style response according to current backend behavior -> Unauthorized or invalid visibility access is blocked -> Sensitive content is not exposed

features.name: Authentication & Account
features.description: Login, session, registration, email verification and password reset flows.

endpoints.description: Authenticate and set auth cookie with JWT.

features.name: Catalog Management
features.description: Public read APIs and admin CRUD for sports, countries, competitions, teams, sportsbooks and home-prashes (including logo upload presign/complete).

endpoints.description: Read catalogs (sports, countries, competitions, teams, sportsbooks, home-prashes).
Create catalog items and presign/complete logo uploads (admin-only).

features.name: Sportsbooks (Public)
features.description: Public read-only list of sportsbooks used by posts.

features.name: Posts & Social Interactions
features.description: Create posts (tipsters), read feeds/details (authenticated), public post detail, comments, reactions, saved posts, views, share/repost, and follow/unfollow.

endpoints.description: Get public post detail by id.
Fetch feeds, details, comments, saved, user posts (authenticated).

features.name: Notifications
features.description: User notifications inbox and read tracking.

features.name: Me Profile
features.description: Manage authenticated user's profile and avatar upload.

features.name: Admin User Management
features.description: Admin-only user listing and moderation actions.

known_limitations.issue: Test profile properties were only present under src/test/resources, which are not used by spring-boot:run.
known_limitations.impact: Local server startup for testing can fail without duplicating the test profile into main resources.

known_limitations.issue: Production properties include sensitive credentials (database, mail, storage).
known_limitations.impact: Secrets may be committed/leaked; should be moved to environment variables or a secrets manager.
